cases.description: 0 coerces to FALSE, so NOT(0) -> TRUE (same numeric-coercion convention as AND/OR/XOR)
cases.expected_note: Numeric coercion for logical functions confirmed via https://www.ablebits.com/office-addins-blog/excel-and-or-xor-not-functions/

cases.description: Any nonzero number coerces to TRUE, so NOT(5) -> FALSE
An arbitrary text literal cannot be coerced to a logical value -> #VALUE!
